message:
fix(export): increase no-clobber retry limit to 1024 for high-collision scenarios

The previous cap of 32 retries could be exhausted in directories with many
prior exports. Bumped to 1024 to match unique_filename's collision strategy
and improved the error message to report the attempt count. Closes c2tz4.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
